_schemaVersionSource: src/features/business-dna/schemas/business-dna-profile.schema.ts → BUSINESS_DNA_PROFILE_SCHEMA_VERSION — keep this value in sync; validate-packages.ts checks it.
_businessCountNote: Counts only packages with metadata.status === "published". ai-automation-agency is status "template" — a placeholder structure, not a registered business — so it contributes 0. The 4 Professional Services packages (accounting-firm, financial-consultancy, insurance-brokerage, tax-consultancy) plus the 4 Taxonomy Expansion packages (law-firm, hr-consultancy, recruitment-agency, business-consultancy) are all status "published", contributing 8 total. See business-library/technology/PROFESSIONAL-SERVICES-INDUSTRY-REPORT.md for the original fit analysis — the latter 4 were deferred there and authored in this sprint after "professionalServices" was added to IndustryType.
